final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an esports monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist, premium aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds layout
Subject: must include the product "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as the focal point
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a minimalist, premium direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, refined surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" and "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: must preserve vertical format for short-video cover, large headline for visual impact
Avoid:
